# You Cannot Pass!

> [!abstract] ⚪ Event · Cost: **0** · Neutral

*Spell.*

---

**Action**: Spend 1 resource to give an **_Istari_** character you control +3 DEF until the end of the phase. Then, you may place You Cannot Pass! on top of your deck.
**Response**: After You Cannot Pass! is discarded from your deck, give an **_Istari_** character you control +6 ATK until the end of the phase.

**Pack:** [[ALeP - Strange News in Bree]] #9
